text.title: Regulatory Compliance 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the product ship to multiple regimes (US + EU + Canada)?

branch.question: Is the WCAG floor pinned to the highest required level?
Are all per-regime artefacts (VPAT / EAA statement / AODA filing) produced?

text.example: Concrete walk: Faion ships to US + EU + Ontario: regimes={Title II, EAA, AODA}; floor 2.2 AA; VPAT + EAA statement + AODA filing all signed → publish.
